oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Optimize /tian implement parent↔child context duplication when tokens get scarce (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Hardened /tian implement: reliable plan submission (fixed the bracketed-paste Return race) + mandatory self-verify coda.
Added opt-in `tian worktree remove --delete-branch` (git branch -d, or -D with --force; an unmerged branch is kept).
Released v0.14.0: ships the renamed /tian skill + /tian implement, auto-installed to ~/.claude/skills on app update.
